summary: XD Connects Import Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed (lookup, add-single, duplicate detection, invalid reference handling). Frontend: Provider dashboard 'Import XD Connects' tab fully functional - shows search form, lookup returns product data (name, price, brand, category, material, sizes, colors, USPs), add-single creates product in database. Playwright scraping takes ~10-15s per lookup.
passed_tests: Backend: Provider login (boutique@sportlyo.fr / boutique123) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/provider/import/xdconnects/lookup/INVALID returns 400 with 'Reference invalide' message
Backend: GET /api/provider/import/xdconnects/lookup/12345 returns 400 (numbers-only format invalid)
Backend: GET /api/provider/import/xdconnects/lookup/P706.33 returns 409 (already imported)
Backend: GET /api/provider/import/xdconnects/lookup/V43009 returns 200 with product data
Backend: GET /api/provider/import/xdconnects/lookup without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/provider/import/xdconnects/add-single creates product in database
Backend: POST /api/provider/import/xdconnects/add-single duplicate detection returns 409
Backend: POST /api/provider/import/xdconnects/add-single without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/provider/catalog includes XD Connects imported products with source='xdconnects'
Frontend: Provider dashboard loads with 'Import XD Connects' tab (data-testid='provider-tab-import-xd')
Frontend: Click 'Import XD Connects' tab shows section (data-testid='provider-import-xd-section')
Frontend: Section title shows 'IMPORT CATALOGUE XD CONNECTS / XINDAO'
Frontend: Reference input field present (data-testid='xd-lookup-ref-input') with placeholder 'Ex: T9101, P706.33, V43009...'
Frontend: Search button present (data-testid='xd-lookup-btn') with 'RECHERCHER' label
Frontend: Lookup result card shows product reference, brand, category badge, price
Frontend: Lookup result card shows product name, description, material, sizes, colors
Frontend: Lookup result card shows USPs with checkmark icons (Vacuum bottle, Leakproof bottle, etc.)
Frontend: 'Ajouter au catalogue' button present (data-testid='xd-add-single-btn')
Frontend: 'Annuler' button present in lookup result
Frontend: 'Voir sur XD Connects' external link present
Frontend: Invalid reference shows error toast 'Reference invalide. Format attendu: T9101, P706.33, V43009...'
Frontend: After adding product, success toast 'V43009 ajouté au catalogue !' displayed
Frontend: After adding product, product count increases (13 → 14)
Frontend: After adding product, form clears for next lookup
Frontend: Catalogue tab shows XD Connects imported products

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All XD Connects import UI features verified)

seed_data_creation: Test products created during backend tests with refs TESTPROD*, DUPTEST001, V43009
context_for_next_testing_agent: XD Connects import feature fully tested. Backend: /app/backend/routers/xdconnects_import.py - lookup endpoint (line 211), add-single endpoint (line 243). Frontend: /app/frontend/src/pages/ProviderDashboard.js - XD Connects section (line 714), handleXdLookup (line 241), handleXdAddSingle (line 255). Playwright scraping takes 10-15 seconds. Products P706.33, V43009, T9101 are now in the provider's catalogue. The data-testids are: provider-tab-import-xd, provider-import-xd-section, xd-lookup-ref-input, xd-lookup-btn, xd-lookup-result, xd-add-single-btn.
